---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Request a clarification, fix, or enhancement to the README or package docs
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ''

---

**Page or Context**
Where did you find the issue?
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] GoDoc / pkg.go.dev
- [ ] Code comments

**Describe the Issue**
A clear and concise description of what is missing, unclear, or incorrect.

**Suggested Fix (Optional)**
If you have a suggestion on how to improve it, please describe it here or provide the exact text.
